allow:
Bash(gh pr create --title "Fix Up Next column width and add cache/indicators" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Fixed Up Next column width consistency issue
- Added localStorage cache for better performance
- Added active task indicator on cards
- Added auto PR creation functionality

## Changes
- `KanbanColumn.tsx`: Adjusted column width styling
- `local-storage-cache.ts`: New caching layer for localStorage operations
- `TaskCard.tsx`: Added visual indicator for active tasks
- `api/create-pr/route.ts`: New API endpoint for PR creation
- `api/review-task/route.ts`: New API endpoint for task review
- `ReviewModal.tsx`: New review modal component
- `useBacklog.ts`: Enhanced with caching and PR creation logic

## Test plan
- [x] Verify Up Next column width matches other columns
- [x] Test localStorage caching functionality
- [x] Verify active task indicator displays correctly
- [x] Test PR creation workflow
EOF
\)")
